006package com.stuypulse.robot.constants;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Amps;
009
010import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.ClosedLoopRampsConfigs;
011import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.CurrentLimitsConfigs;
012import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.FeedbackConfigs;
013import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.MotionMagicConfigs;
014import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.MotorOutputConfigs;
015import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.OpenLoopRampsConfigs;
016import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.Slot0Configs;
017import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.Slot1Configs;
018import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.Slot2Configs;
019import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.SlotConfigs;
020import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.TalonFXConfiguration;
021import com.ctre.phoenix6.hardware.TalonFX;
022import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.FeedbackSensorSourceValue;
023import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.GravityTypeValue;
024import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.InvertedValue;
025import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.NeutralModeValue;
026import edu.wpi.first.networktables.DoubleSubscriber;
027
028/*-
029 * File containing all of the configurations that different motors require.
030 *
031 * Such configurations include:
032 *  - If it is Inverted
033 *  - The Idle Mode of the Motor
034 *  - The Current Limit
035 *  - The Open Loop Ramp Rate
036 */
037public interface Motors {
038
039        /** Classes to store all of the values a motor needs */
040        public interface Intake {
041
042                TalonFXConfig PIVOT_CONFIG = new TalonFXConfig()
043                                .withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(30)
044                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(40)
045                                .withInvertedValue( // not necessarily true, get inverted val
046                                                InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive)
047                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Brake)
048                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Intake.Pivot.GEAR_RATIO)
049                                .withGravityType(GravityTypeValue.Arm_Cosine)
050                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Intake.kP, Gains.Intake.kI, Gains.Intake.kD, 0)
051                                .withFFConstants(
052                                                Gains.Intake.kS.in(Amps),
053                                                Gains.Intake.kA.in(Amps),
054                                                Gains.Intake.kV.in(Amps),
055                                                Gains.Intake.kG.in(Amps), // regular constants
056                                                0)
057                                .withPIDConstants(
058                                                Gains.Intake.Digestion.kP, Gains.Intake.Digestion.kI, Gains.Intake.Digestion.kD, 1)
059                                .withFFConstants(
060                                                Gains.Intake.kS.in(Amps),
061                                                Gains.Intake.kA.in(Amps),
062                                                Gains.Intake.kV.in(Amps),
063                                                Gains.Intake.kG.in(Amps), // digestion constants
064                                                1);
065
066                TalonFXConfig LEFT_ROLLER_CONFIG = // TODO: apply later
067                                new TalonFXConfig()
068                                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(50)
069                                                .withInvertedValue( // not necessarily true, get inverted val
070                                                                InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive)
071                                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
072                                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Intake.Roller.GEAR_RATIO);
073
074                TalonFXConfig RIGHT_ROLLER_CONFIG = // TODO: apply later
075                                new TalonFXConfig()
076                                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(50)
077                                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive)
078                                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
079                                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Intake.Roller.GEAR_RATIO);
080        }
081
082        public interface Feeder {
083
084                // TODO: get values after motor pinion swap
085                TalonFXConfig LEADER_CONFIG = new TalonFXConfig()
086                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
087                                // .withRampRate(0.25)
088                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
089                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive)
090                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Feeder.GEAR_RATIO);
091        }
092
093        public interface Shooter {
094                TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_LEFT = new TalonFXConfig()
095                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP.get(), Gains.Shooter.kI.get(), Gains.Shooter.kD.get(), 0)
096                                .withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(200)
097                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(200)
098                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
099                                .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS.get(), Gains.Shooter.kV.get(), Gains.Shooter.kA.get(), 0)
100                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive);
101
102                TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_CENTER = new TalonFXConfig()
103                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP.get(), Gains.Shooter.kI.get(), Gains.Shooter.kD.get(), 0)
104                                .withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(200)
105                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(200)
106                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
107                                .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS.get(), Gains.Shooter.kV.get(), Gains.Shooter.kA.get(), 0)
108                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive);
109
110                TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_RIGHT = new TalonFXConfig()
111                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP.get(), Gains.Shooter.kI.get(), Gains.Shooter.kD.get(), 0)
112                                .withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(200)
113                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(200)
114                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
115                                .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS.get(), Gains.Shooter.kV.get(), Gains.Shooter.kA.get(), 0)
116                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive);
117        }
118
119        public interface Handoff {
120
121                TalonFXConfig HANDOFF_MOTOR_CONFIG = new TalonFXConfig()
122                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
123                                // .withRampRate(0.25)
124                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
125                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive)
126                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Handoff.GEAR_RATIO);
127        }
128
129        public static class TalonFXConfig {
130
131                private final TalonFXConfiguration configuration = new TalonFXConfiguration();
132
133                private final Slot0Configs slot0Configs = new Slot0Configs();
134
135                private final Slot1Configs slot1Configs = new Slot1Configs();
136
137                private final Slot2Configs slot2Configs = new Slot2Configs();
138
139                private final MotorOutputConfigs motorOutputConfigs = new MotorOutputConfigs();
140
141                private final ClosedLoopRampsConfigs closedLoopRampsConfigs = new ClosedLoopRampsConfigs();
142
143                private final OpenLoopRampsConfigs openLoopRampsConfigs = new OpenLoopRampsConfigs();
144
145                private final CurrentLimitsConfigs currentLimitsConfigs = new CurrentLimitsConfigs();
146
147                private final FeedbackConfigs feedbackConfigs = new FeedbackConfigs();
148
149                private final MotionMagicConfigs motionMagicConfigs = new MotionMagicConfigs();
150
151                private final double[] lastKP = new double[3];
152                private final double[] lastKI = new double[3];
153                private final double[] lastKD = new double[3];
154                private final double[] lastKS = new double[3];
155                private final double[] lastKV = new double[3];
156                private final double[] lastKA = new double[3];
157
158                /* 
159                public void updateGainsConfig(
160                                TalonFX motor,
161                                int slot,
162                                DoubleSubscriber kP,
163                                DoubleSubscriber kI,
164                                DoubleSubscriber kD,
165                                DoubleSubscriber kS,
166                                DoubleSubscriber kV,
167                                DoubleSubscriber kA) {
168                        if (slot != 0 && slot != 1 && slot != 2) {
169                                return;
170                        }
171
172                        final double currentKP = kP.get();
173                        final double currentKI = kI.get();
174                        final double currentKD = kD.get();
175                        final double currentKS = kS.get();
176                        final double currentKV = kV.get();
177                        final double currentKA = kA.get();
178
179                        final boolean changed = currentKP != lastKP[slot]
180                                        || currentKI != lastKI[slot]
181                                        || currentKD != lastKD[slot]
182                                        || currentKS != lastKS[slot]
183                                        || currentKV != lastKV[slot]
184                                        || currentKA != lastKA[slot];
185
186                        if (!changed) {
187                                return;
188                        }
189
190                        final SlotConfigs gainConfig = new SlotConfigs()
191                                        .withKP(currentKP)
192                                        .withKI(currentKI)
193                                        .withKD(currentKD)
194                                        .withKS(currentKS)
195                                        .withKV(currentKV)
196                                        .withKA(currentKA);
197
198                        gainConfig.SlotNumber = slot;
199
200                        motor.getConfigurator().apply(gainConfig);
201
202                        lastKP[slot] = currentKP;
203                        lastKI[slot] = currentKI;
204                        lastKD[slot] = currentKD;
205                        lastKS[slot] = currentKS;
206                        lastKV[slot] = currentKV;
207                        lastKA[slot] = currentKA;
208
209                        switch (slot) {
210                                case 0:
211                                        motor.getConfigurator().refresh(this.getConfiguration().Slot0);
212                                        break;
213                                case 1:
214                                        motor.getConfigurator().refresh(this.getConfiguration().Slot1);
215                                        break;
216                                case 2:
217                                        motor.getConfigurator().refresh(this.getConfiguration().Slot2);
218                                        break;
219                        }
220                }*/
221
222                public TalonFXConfiguration getConfiguration() {
223                        return this.configuration;
224                }
225
226                public void configure(TalonFX motor) {
227                        motor.getConfigurator().apply(configuration);
228                }
229
230                // SLOT 0 CONFIGS
231                public TalonFXConfig withPIDConstants(double kP, double kI, double kD, int slot) {
232                        switch (slot) {
233                                case 0:
234                                        configuration.withSlot0(slot0Configs.withKP(kP).withKI(kI).withKD(kD));
235                                        break;
236                                case 1:
237                                        configuration.withSlot1(slot1Configs.withKP(kP).withKI(kI).withKD(kD));
238                                        break;
239                                case 2:
240                                        configuration.withSlot2(slot2Configs.withKP(kP).withKI(kI).withKD(kD));
241                                        break;
242                        }
243                        return this;
244                }
245
246                public TalonFXConfig withFFConstants(double kS, double kV, double kA, int slot) {
247                        return withFFConstants(kS, kV, kA, 0, slot);
248                }
249
250                public TalonFXConfig withFFConstants(double kS, double kV, double kA, double kG, int slot) {
251                        switch (slot) {
252                                case 0:
253                                        configuration.withSlot0(slot0Configs.withKS(kS).withKV(kV).withKA(kA).withKG(kG));
254                                        break;
255                                case 1:
256                                        configuration.withSlot1(slot1Configs.withKS(kS).withKV(kV).withKA(kA).withKG(kG));
257                                        break;
258                                case 2:
259                                        configuration.withSlot2(slot2Configs.withKS(kS).withKV(kV).withKA(kA).withKG(kG));
260                                        break;
261                        }
262                        return this;
263                }
264
265                public TalonFXConfig withGravityType(GravityTypeValue gravityType) {
266                        configuration.withSlot0(slot0Configs.withGravityType(gravityType));
267                        configuration.withSlot1(slot1Configs.withGravityType(gravityType));
268                        configuration.withSlot2(slot2Configs.withGravityType(gravityType));
269                        return this;
270                }
271
272                // MOTOR OUTPUT CONFIGS
273                public TalonFXConfig withInvertedValue(InvertedValue invertedValue) {
274                        configuration.withMotorOutput(motorOutputConfigs.withInverted(invertedValue));
275                        return this;
276                }
277
278                public TalonFXConfig withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue neutralMode) {
279                        configuration.withMotorOutput(motorOutputConfigs.withNeutralMode(neutralMode));
280                        return this;
281                }
282
283                // RAMP RATE CONFIGS
284                public TalonFXConfig withRampRate(double rampRate) {
285                        closedLoopRampsConfigs
286                                        .withDutyCycleClosedLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
287                                        .withTorqueClosedLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
288                                        .withVoltageClosedLoopRampPeriod(rampRate);
289                        openLoopRampsConfigs
290                                        .withDutyCycleOpenLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
291                                        .withTorqueOpenLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
292                                        .withVoltageOpenLoopRampPeriod(rampRate);
293                        configuration.withClosedLoopRamps(closedLoopRampsConfigs);
294                        configuration.withOpenLoopRamps(openLoopRampsConfigs);
295                        return this;
296                }
297
298                // CURRENT LIMIT CONFIGS
299                public TalonFXConfig withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(double currentLimitAmps) {
300                        currentLimitsConfigs
301                                        .withStatorCurrentLimit(currentLimitAmps)
302                                        .withStatorCurrentLimitEnable(true);
303                        configuration.withCurrentLimits(currentLimitsConfigs);
304                        return this;
305                }
306
307                public TalonFXConfig withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(double currentLimitAmps) {
308                        currentLimitsConfigs
309                                        .withSupplyCurrentLimit(currentLimitAmps)
310                                        .withSupplyCurrentLimitEnable(true);
311                        configuration.withCurrentLimits(currentLimitsConfigs);
312                        return this;
313                }
314
315                // MOTION MAGIC CONFIGS
316                public TalonFXConfig withMotionProfile(double maxVelocity, double maxAcceleration) {
317                        motionMagicConfigs
318                                        .withMotionMagicCruiseVelocity(maxVelocity)
319                                        .withMotionMagicAcceleration(maxAcceleration);
320                        configuration.withMotionMagic(motionMagicConfigs);
321                        return this;
322                }
323
324                // FEEDBACK CONFIGS
325                public TalonFXConfig withRemoteSensor(
326                                int ID, FeedbackSensorSourceValue source, double rotorToSensorRatio) {
327                        feedbackConfigs
328                                        .withFeedbackRemoteSensorID(ID)
329                                        .withFeedbackSensorSource(source)
330                                        .withRotorToSensorRatio(rotorToSensorRatio);
331                        configuration.withFeedback(feedbackConfigs);
332                        return this;
333                }
334
335                public TalonFXConfig withSensorToMechanismRatio(double sensorToMechanismRatio) {
336                        configuration.withFeedback(
337                                        feedbackConfigs.withSensorToMechanismRatio(sensorToMechanismRatio));
338                        return this;
339                }
340        }
341}
